title: Skyline
writer: Rowland Brown, William Anthony McGuire, Dudley Nichols
actors: Thomas Meighan, Hardie Albright, Maureen O'Sullivan
plot: Skyline is a 1931 drama film directed by Sam Taylor and starring silent film veteran Thomas Meighan. It is based on a novel, East Side, West Side by Felix Riesenberg. It was produced and released by Fox Film Corporation.
